domains.title: Knowledge graph foundation
domains.productPromise: Continuously map ODaaS intelligence domains and dependencies.
domains.notes: Parser, graph build, tests, viewer, public JSON export (knowledge-graph.json v2 embeds intelligence plan), and graph diff (diffKnowledgeGraphs) are complete.

domains.title: Org model intelligence
domains.productPromise: Ingest and normalize organization structures and constraints.
domains.notes: Twelve executable slices in features/org-model-intelligence.feature (ORG-01 through ORG-06, DATA-01 through DATA-05) covering structure, reporting validation, baseline isolation, ingest normalization, schema and duplicate-key rejection, idempotent re-ingest, unknown parent references, and ingest-time cycle detection; implemented in features/support/org-model-driver.ts. Next.js UI for these flows is not wired yet (app scaffold only).

domains.title: Scenario intelligence
domains.productPromise: Generate and score what-if organizational scenarios.
domains.notes: Baseline fork, scenario lifecycle draft→ready→archived, subtree reparenting without mutating baseline, deterministic scenario ranking, scoring-based readiness gate, deterministic baseline diff, and tabular scenario comparison (@SCN-01, @SCN-02, @SCN-03, @SCN-04, @SCN-05, @SCN-06, @S-SCN-01, @S-SCN-02, @S-SCN-03, @S-SCN-04, @S-SCN-05). Broader what-if catalog remains planned.

domains.title: Recommendation intelligence
domains.productPromise: Produce prescriptive design recommendations from analysis + scenarios.
domains.notes: Structured artifact generation, deterministic golden fixture, accept/reject review with reviewer metadata (@REC-01 to @REC-05, @S-REC-01 to @S-REC-04). Production ADK integration and richer constraint libraries remain planned.

domains.title: Monitoring intelligence
domains.productPromise: Track post-change effects and drift in a closed redesign loop.

domains.title: API contract intelligence
domains.productPromise: Expose stable contracts for ingest, scenario, recommendation, and monitoring.
domains.notes: Domain logic is exercised via Cucumber and in-memory drivers; HTTP/OpenAPI surfaces are not implemented yet.

domains.title: Experience workflow intelligence
domains.productPromise: Deliver end-user workflows from baseline through monitored decisions.
domains.notes: Next.js 16 app shell (app/layout.tsx, app/page.tsx) is present; org/scenario/recommendation workflows are not exposed in the UI yet.

domains.title: Environmental intelligence
domains.productPromise: Make project energy and environmental impact visible across baseline, scenario, and recommendation workflows.
domains.notes: LAT scope is defined for energy/carbon transparency, baseline drift, policy-aware controls, and monitoring integration; executable service slices are not implemented yet.

domains.title: Financial intelligence
domains.productPromise: Quantify scenario economics and growth leverage to support defensible org design decisions.
domains.notes: LAT scope is defined for baseline vs scenario economics, sensitivity bands, implementation burden, and portfolio comparisons; executable scenario finance slices are not implemented yet.

domains.title: Governance and sentiment intelligence
domains.productPromise: Provide a governance portal for support/policy workflows and consolidate NPS/eNPS context for actionable sentiment monitoring.
domains.notes: LAT scope is defined for request intake/routing, policy Q&A, and sentiment consolidation with governance context; executable domain/API/UI slices are not implemented yet.
